name: acb-vscode-extension
description: ACB VS Code extension for project status awareness and local project control bridge.

acb.executorProfiles.codex.terminalName.description: Terminal name used by ACB for the Codex executor profile.

acb.executorProfiles.codex.launchCommand.description: Command sent only when the user explicitly starts the Codex executor terminal.

acb.executorProfiles.claude-code.termina.description: Terminal name used by ACB for the Claude Code executor profile.

acb.executorProfiles.claude-code.launchC.description: Command sent only when the user explicitly starts the Claude Code executor terminal.

acb.executorProfiles.deepseek.terminalNa.description: Optional terminal name used by ACB for the DeepSeek executor profile.

acb.executorProfiles.deepseek.launchComm.description: Optional command sent only when the user explicitly starts the DeepSeek executor terminal. Empty by default because no safe command is assumed.
